title: Puter
description: An open-source, internet OS for secure cloud storage, web development, and desktop virtualization. Features an extensible GUI, privacy-first cloud, platform for apps, and remote desktop support.

title: Aether
description: Transforms AI chat into explorable, branching trees of thought. Features include visual chat trees, model comparison, persistent context, web search grounding, and rich media support.

title: CSDNA
description: A web-based platform for DNA-PAINT microscopy image analysis. Uses GPU-powered clustering and machine learning to analyze DNA origami structures with interactive visualization and statistical reporting.

title: Agentex
description: An AI-powered Chrome extension that intelligently tailors and optimizes LaTeX resumes for specific job descriptions using Gemini AI. Features instant LaTeX-to-PDF, ATS-check, project swaps, and real-time preview.

title: VoxelCV
description: Toolkit for human posture analysis and AI-powered fall detection, using MediaPipe pose estimation, Google Gemini Vision integration, and real-time webcam or batch processing for healthcare/safety.

title: DocEd
description: AI-powered documentation generator for GitHub repositories, using Pinecone embeddings and LLMs to auto-generate, summarize, and structure project docs and READMEs with a modern web interface.

title: asusoda/platform
description: Modular internal API and Discord bots platform for SoDA at ASU, supporting club APIs, point tracking, events, authentication, Discord integration, and more.

title: auto-git
description: AI-powered CLI/VSCode extension for smart git commits. Analyzes code changes, generates commit messages, and pushes updates, integrating with Gemini AI and full CI/CD, testing, and VSCode UI.

title: sandbox
description: Multi-purpose Jupyter repository for deep learning and classic ML prototyping; features notebooks for GANs, VAEs, image segmentation, model comparison, and various research experiments.

title: HeadBobberGames
description: Prismatrix: Multiplayer arcade light cycle game with 3D neon effects, customizable controls, and dynamic game settings. Entire collection of web-arcade games for social fun.

title: zsh_plugin
description: Advanced Zsh plugin with fast native C/C++ autocompletion, ghost text features, productivity commands, emoji removal, and modern CI for shell productivity.

title: promen
description: Prompt engineering and automation toolkit, exploring prompt scripting and experimental web automation (CI/CD, GitHub Actions pilots).
